sub_modules.aes_sbox: Combinational AES forward S-box lookup for one byte.
sub_modules.aes_subbytes: Applies the AES forward S-box independently to all 16 state bytes.
sub_modules.aes_shiftrows: Combinational AES ShiftRows byte permutation using column-major AES state ordering.
sub_modules.aes_mixcolumns: Combinational AES MixColumns transformation with GF(2^8) multiply-by-2 and multiply-by-3 logic.
sub_modules.aes_round: One full AES encryption round: SubBytes, ShiftRows, MixColumns, and AddRoundKey.
sub_modules.aes_key_expand: One AES-128 key schedule step producing the next 128-bit round key for the configured round number.
